who: small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For small law firm accountants processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient billing compilation causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoice drafting instead of manual compilation in spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient compilation of billing time entries into invoices
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firm accountants
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to small law firm accountants with demos
Engage in community forums for law firm tools
try_it: Let users manually enter time and generate draft invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save frequently used inputs as templates
Allow CSV import for existing time entries
